TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte OpenType tag used to identify tables, axes, and other font features.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse (string? tag);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse(string tag) cil managed

Docs.param: The string to parse. If or empty, a zero tag is returned.
Docs.summary: Parses a string into an , padding with spaces if the string is shorter than four characters.
Docs.returns: An constructed from the first four characters of the string, padded with spaces as needed. Returns a zero tag if the string is or empty.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string ToString ();
.method public hidebysig virtual instance string ToString() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of this tag.
Docs.returns: A four-character string where each character corresponds to one byte of the tag value.
